summary: Completed comprehensive floor plan feature testing. Backend APIs working well (96% success rate). Frontend floor plan interface loads correctly with pre-made room creation fully functional, but wall selection/deletion and room resize functionality need fixes.

ui_bugs.issue: Zone tabs are duplicated multiple times (found 18 tabs instead of 3 zones)
Console shows hydration errors with nested buttons in zone tabs
ui_bugs.selector: Zone tab buttons with nested onClick handlers

integration_issues.issue: Walls can be clicked but Delete button doesn't appear in sidebar after selection
3-dot menu (MoreVertical icon) not found next to zone tabs for 'Delete Zone' functionality
Room selection works but no resize handles appear (missing 8 resize handles: 4 corners + 4 edges)
Wall selection highlighting (orange/accent color) not clearly visible when wall is selected

passed_tests: Backend APIs working (24/25 tests passed - 96% success rate)
Floor plan page navigation and loading
Pre-made room shapes detection (Quadrado, Retangular, Redondo)
Room creation modal with dimension inputs
Room appearance on canvas with correct labeling
Basic tool selection (Select, Draw Wall, Add Element)
Wall detection on canvas (4 walls found)
Zone tab navigation between different zones
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix wall selection to show Delete button in sidebar when wall is selected. Add 3-dot menu next to zone tabs with 'Delete Zone' option. Implement room resize handles (8 handles: 4 corners + 4 edges) when room is selected. Fix zone tab duplication issue. Improve wall selection highlighting with orange/accent color.
